name: Baked Halibut on a Bed of Peppers
recipeIngredient: 2 red bell peppers (cored, seeded, and cut lengthwise into 1/2-inch strips)
1 yellow bell pepper (cored, seeded, and cut lengthwise into 1/2-inch strips)
Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add the peppers and onion; cook for 10 minutes, stirring often.
3. Add vinegar and Herbes de Provence; cook for an additional 15 minutes, stirring often. Season with salt and pepper, then stir in parsley. Spoon the vegetables into the bottom of a 9x9-inch baking dish.
4. Brush the fish fillets (1-inch thick, 8 oz each) with the remaining oil. Sprinkle both sides with salt and pepper; place them on top of the vegetables in the baking dish.
5. Bake for 20 minutes.
6. Garnish the fish with any remaining parsley and lemon halves. Serve immediately.
Per serving: 383 calories, 15 grams fat, 68 milligrams cholesterol.
